_snapshot_meta.snapshot_purpose: Pre-fix revert reference for Bug 1 (Write Follow-ups appendOrUpdate→append) and Bug 2 (Build Follow-up Sequence source: Prepare Send Fields→Send via Gmail via pairedItem)

nodes.name: Write Follow-ups to Queue
nodes._note: Full schema preserved in n8n versionId 5d0a7c57-9f1f-4a82-88eb-bd9c4cb0b7e4 (v124). Bug 1 fix only changes operation to 'append'; matchingColumns becomes irrelevant for append but left intact.

_revert_instructions: To revert: n8n_update_partial_workflow id=QG8tNjLdKCQkZpWA with two updateNode ops — (1) wf4-write-followups parameters.operation back to 'appendOrUpdate'; (2) wf4-build-followups parameters.jsCode back to the snapshot above. Or restore via n8n UI version history: select v124, restore.
